pool-filtration-systems.name: Pool Filtration Systems
pool-filtration-systems.intro: Pool Filtration Systems include sand filters and multiport valves from brands like Hayward, AstralPool, and Pentair. When selecting a system, consider filter type, flow rate, and valve configuration. Aquora offers various sizes and capacities for both top-mounted and side-mounted applications, suitable for diverse pool requirements in the UAE and GCC regions.

pool-heaters.name: Pool Heaters
pool-heaters.intro: Pool heaters regulate water temperature, extending the usability of pools, spas, and water features. When selecting a unit, consider power output and flow rate, available across various models. Aquora offers a range of pool heaters from brands like Hayward and Atecpool, including inverter and non-inverter heat pump options.

pool-cleaners.name: Pool Cleaners and Accessories
pool-cleaners.intro: Aquora offers a selection of pool cleaners and accessories designed for maintaining pools in the UAE/GCC region. Our range includes robotic pool cleaners from brands such as Hayward, Pentair, and Dolphin, suitable for various pool sizes and surfaces. Consider pool dimensions and surface type when selecting equipment from our inventory.

pool-pumps.name: Pool Pumps
pool-pumps.intro: Pool pumps circulate water for filtration and sanitation. When selecting a pump, consider flow rate (m3/h), horsepower (HP), and voltage. Aquora offers a range of pool pumps from brands like Hayward, Pentair, Speck, Atecpool, AstralPool, Zodiac, DAB, and Aqua, including variable speed (VSTD) and single-speed self-priming models.

pool-lighting.name: Pool Lighting
pool-lighting.intro: Pool lighting illuminates pools, spas, and water features. Considerations include light type, power, and beam angle. Aquora offers a range of pool lighting solutions from brands such as Teclumen, Behncke, Pentair, Atecpool, and AstralPool, including LED fountain lights with various wattages and beam angles.

pool-and-pond-lining-waterproofing.name: Pool & Pond Lining, Waterproofing
pool-and-pond-lining-waterproofing.intro: The Pool & Pond Lining, Waterproofing category features materials and systems designed to contain water in pools, ponds, and other water features. This includes porcelain stoneware edges from Rosa Gres, available in various colours and anti-slip finishes. When selecting, consider the specific application and required dimensions for effective sealing and aesthetic integration.

fountain-nozzles.name: Fountain nozzles
fountain-nozzles.intro: Fountain nozzles direct and shape water flow in fountains and water features. When selecting, consider nozzle type, connection size, and desired water effect. Aquora offers a range of fountain nozzles, including cascade, deck jet, column, and comet styles from brands like AstralPool and Atecpool, alongside WaterSwitch accessories.

water-treatment-equipment.name: Water Treatment Equipment
water-treatment-equipment.intro: Water Treatment Equipment encompasses systems for maintaining water quality in pools and other aquatic features. This includes dosing pumps, salt chlorinators, and UV sanitizers from brands like Atecpool, Behncke, and Pentair. Aquora supplies a range of these products for various capacities and applications across the UAE and GCC.

dehumidifiers.name: Dehumidifiers
dehumidifiers.intro: Dehumidifiers manage humidity levels in enclosed pool environments. Aquora offers a range of models, including ducted, wall-mounted, and through-the-wall units from brands like Dantherm, AtecPool, and Zodiac. Available specifications include varying extraction rates and air circulation capacities to suit different pool sizes and requirements.

pool-shell-equipment.name: Pool Shell Equipment
pool-shell-equipment.intro: Pool Shell Equipment includes essential components integrated into the structure of pools and spas. This category features main drains and overflow gratings from brands like Pentair, Rosa, and Behncke. Considerations for selection include size, material, and color to suit various pool designs and specifications.

pond-lighting.name: Pond and fountain lighting
pond-lighting.intro: Pond and fountain lighting illuminates water features, enhancing their visual appeal. Considerations include LED panel or ring lights, color options like blue, cool white, warm white, or RGB, and voltage requirements. Aquora offers a range of Pentair, Atecpool, and Astralpool lighting solutions for diverse applications across the UAE and GCC.

waterfalls-counter-currents-systems-hydr.name: Waterfalls, Counter Currents Systems, Hydromassage Systems
waterfalls-counter-currents-systems-hydr.intro: This category features equipment for water movement and hydrotherapy in pools and spas. It includes waterfalls, counter current systems for swimming against a flow, and hydromassage systems. Aquora offers a range of products from brands like Behncke, Pentair, AtecPool, Swimeo, AstralPool, Zodiac, Aqua, and Airtech, including turbine covers for various pool types.

pump-parts.name: Pool Pump Spare Parts
pump-parts.intro: This category covers individual components for the maintenance and repair of pool pumps. It includes motors, motor covers, bearings, and connection cables from brands such as SPECK and AstralPool. These spare parts are suitable for various pump models and horsepower ratings used in UAE/GCC pools, spas, and water features.

fountain-pumps.name: Fountain pumps
fountain-pumps.intro: Fountain pumps circulate water for various aquatic features. When selecting, consider power, flow rate, and voltage. Aquora offers a range of submersible fountain pumps from brands like Atecpool and Astralpool, with options for controllability and varying specifications to suit diverse applications.

hot-tubs-saunas-steam-generators-electri.name: SPA Tubs, Saunas, Steam Generators, Electric sauna heaters
hot-tubs-saunas-steam-generators-electri.intro: Explore Aquora's range of SPA Tubs, Saunas, Steam Generators, and Electric Sauna Heaters from brands like Atecpool, Sundance, and Astralpool. This category includes various sauna room configurations, such as Atecpool TyloHelo square and corner units, alongside electric sauna heaters like the Atecpool Helo FONDA DET and Helo Cup models. Consider dimensions and power specifications when selecting equipment for your pool, spa, or water feature needs.

tester.name: Pool testers
tester.intro: Pool testers are essential for maintaining water quality in pools and spas, measuring parameters like pH, chlorine, bromine, and active oxygen. Aquora offers a range of testing solutions, from Atecpool MiniTesters and test blocks to digital kits and test strips from brands like CTX, AstralPool, and AquaCheck, suitable for various water treatment methods.

swimming-and-competition-pool-accessorie.name: Swimming & Competition Pool Accessories
swimming-and-competition-pool-accessorie.intro: Aquora offers swimming and competition pool accessories, including Atecpool luxury showers and AstralPool lane ropes and floaters. When selecting equipment, consider material specifications like stainless steel for showers or the length and float type for lane ropes. Our range supports various pool requirements across the UAE and GCC.

ladders-and-handrails.name: Ladders & Handrails
ladders-and-handrails.intro: Ladders and handrails provide access and support for inground pools. When selecting, consider the number of steps and the stainless steel grade, such as AISI-304 or AISI-316. Aquora offers a range of AtecPool, AstralPool, and Aqua ladders, including easy access, asymmetrical, and muro designs.

pool-covers.name: Pool Covers
pool-covers.intro: Pool covers provide a protective layer for swimming pools. When selecting a pool cover, consider factors such as pool dimensions and operational preferences, including automatic or solar options. Aquora offers a range of AstralPool and Aqua pool covers, including Bellasun and Sveltea models, available in various sizes and colour combinations.

fiberglass-pools.name: Prefabricated Pools
fiberglass-pools.intro: Prefabricated pools offer a streamlined installation process for various aquatic applications. This category includes stainless steel pool options from brands like AstralPool, available with either overflow or skimmer systems. Aquora provides a range of sizes and models, such as the Comfort, Sports, Wellness, and Optimal series, to suit different requirements.

chemicals-for-spa.name: SPA treatment
chemicals-for-spa.intro: Aquora offers a range of spa treatment products for maintaining water quality and hygiene. Our selection includes CTX and Ocedis brand cleaners for cartridge filters, surfaces, and pipework, along with clarifiers, defoamers, and hardness stabilizers. We also supply essential sanitizers such as bromine and chlorine in various forms, alongside pH adjusters for balanced spa water.

cleaning.name: Pool cleaners
cleaning.intro: Aquora offers a selection of pool cleaning solutions for maintaining water quality and equipment. Our range includes descalers, winterizing treatments, and waterline cleaners from brands like CTX, suitable for various pool types and maintenance needs across the UAE and GCC.

anti-algae.name: Pool algaecide
anti-algae.intro: Aquora offers a selection of pool algaecides designed to manage and prevent algae growth in swimming pools. Our range includes liquid formulations from brands like CTX and AstralPool, available in various sizes from 1L to 25L. Products such as CTX AlgaStop and AstralPool AlgiStop are available to address different treatment requirements.

flocculant.name: Pool flocculant
flocculant.intro: Pool flocculant aids in clarifying pool water by consolidating small particles for easier filtration or removal. Aquora offers a range of flocculants in liquid, tablet, gel, and pod forms, including options from CTX, AstralPool, and Ocedis. These products are available in various sizes and formulations to suit different pool maintenance requirements.

chlorine.name: Pool chlorine
chlorine.intro: Pool chlorine products are available in liquid, powder, granulated, and tablet forms for swimming pool disinfection. Options include quick-acting chlorine and long-lasting multiaction formulas, some of which are boric-free. Aquora supplies various chlorine solutions from brands like CTX, AstralPool, and Ocedis, in pack sizes ranging from 1 kg to 25 kg.

ph-balance.name: Pool pH regulators
ph-balance.intro: Pool pH regulators are essential for maintaining balanced water chemistry in swimming pools. This category includes products designed to either increase or decrease pH levels, available in liquid, granulated, or powder forms. Aquora offers a selection of pH regulators from brands like CTX and AstralPool, in various sizes for both domestic and professional applications.

pool-filters-spare-parts.name: Pool Filters Spare Parts
pool-filters-spare-parts.intro: Pool filter spare parts are essential for maintaining filtration system functionality. This category includes a range of multiport valves, such as the AstralPool VRAC III, Magnum, Flat, and Classic models. Available in various sizes and mounting configurations, these components support diverse pool, spa, and water feature filtration requirements across the UAE and GCC.

fountain-accessories.name: Fountain accessories
fountain-accessories.intro: Fountain accessories include essential components for fountain installation and maintenance. This category features AstralPool cable inlet fittings and junction boxes, available with varying numbers of inlets from 1 to 32. These products facilitate organized and secure electrical connections for diverse fountain setups.

fountain-kits.name: Fountain kits
fountain-kits.intro: Fountain kits provide a complete solution for creating water features. These kits typically include a pump, nozzle, and necessary connections, simplifying installation. Aquora offers a selection of Astralpool Plug and Play fountain kits, available in various designs such as Mushroom, Spear, Vulcano, and Foamy, all with a 0.105 kW power rating.

chlorine-free.name: Pool chlorine free sanitizers
chlorine-free.intro: Pool chlorine free sanitizers offer alternatives to traditional chlorine for maintaining water hygiene. This category includes bromine and active oxygen products, available in various forms like tablets and powders. Aquora provides a selection from brands such as AstralPool and Ocedis, catering to different pool sanitization needs.

pvc-pipes-and-fittings.name: PVC Pipes & Fittings
pvc-pipes-and-fittings.intro: Our PVC Pipes & Fittings category offers a selection of components essential for water circulation systems. Featuring brands like Cepex, Griffon, Tangit, and Sekisui, we provide various PVC-U true union ball valves with both metric and imperial female threaded connections. These products are available in multiple sizes to suit diverse installation requirements for pools, spas, and water features across the UAE and GCC.

water-slides.name: Water Slides
water-slides.intro: Aquora offers a selection of water slides for diverse aquatic environments. Our range includes various slide types such as Aquatube, Body slide, Freefall, and Multislide configurations, available from brands like Polgun and Compact. We also supply splash towers and zones designed for children's areas, providing options for different user experiences.
